name_en: Chanel ⚠️ 25K Champagne Gold AS1786 Best-selling Gold Ball CF Mini Flap. Compared to the previous vintage gold ball, this one is brighter and shinier. The chain has an extra small gold ball. Not only retro and beautiful, but also adjustable in length. Can be worn as a waist bag or crossbody. Too exquisite and perfect 💕 Love it so much 🥰🥰 Sold out globally 🤩🤩 Dimensions: 18cm
